replies.msg:
I.O.I（韓語：아이오아이 / Ideal Of Idol縮寫 ），韓國十一人女子團體，成員均由Mnet所企劃的韓國第一個「經紀公司大型企劃女團」生存實境節目《PRODUCE 101》所選拔而成，並以YMC Entertainment旗下藝人的身份進行為期一年的活動。十一位成員為林娜榮、金請夏、金世正、鄭彩妍、周潔瓊、金素慧、俞璉靜、磪有情、康美娜、金度延、全昭彌。成員們自發地進行投票選出隊長，最後由林娜榮獲得最多票數，獲選為 I.O.I 的隊長。

依約定I.O.I以YMC娛樂旗下藝人的身份進行固定期限的活動，於2016年5月4日正式出道，2017年1月31日正式解散。雖然未得各自所屬社承認，但成員們多次提到五年後會再以I.O.I身份出現於大眾面前。

昭彌第三次加入企劃組合「鄰家少女」 新曲舞臺預告公開！粉絲擔心的卻是……

KBS TV新概念綜藝節目《偶像電視劇工作團》裡有一支七人企劃女團「鄰家少女」，由昭 彌、Seulgi等來自不同組合的大勢女團成員組成，近日終於揭開了神秘面紗的一角！

節目PD高國振（音）在個人IG上公開了鄰家少女的舞臺短片，七位成員分別是Red Velvet 的Seulgi、I.O.I的昭彌、MAMAMOO的玟星、CIVA的金昭希、OH MY GIRL的YooA、Lovelyz 的洙正、SONAMOO的D.ana，字幕寫道：「鄰家少女的反叛時代開始了！ 大韓民國女團終 結者來了！ 」

這首歌由B1A4隊長振永擔任作曲和製作，網友聽過預告片裡的旋律後感歎：和振永之前的 style不太一樣，多了girl crush 的感覺，超期待完整音源的！

高國振PD表示：「這個預告片是節目中即將誕生的電視劇《只走花路》中出現的女團鄰家 少女的演出現場。 」

《偶像電視劇工作團》中，七位女團成員將親自撰寫電視劇劇本、 親自演出，是韓國第一檔電視劇任務真人秀。 節目中誕生的劇本也將拍成真正的電視劇，單是客串出演的就有振永、昭彌、請夏、金鐘 民、權五重等等。

6月2日，MBK娛樂表示，旗下女團DIA成員鄭彩妍確定出演SBS新水木劇《再次重逢的世界》。

MBK娛樂方面表示：「鄭彩妍確定出演《再次重逢的世界》。目前，正在協調有關劇本整理及拍攝日程等。鄭彩妍將盡最大的努力通過《再次重逢的世界》為觀眾們帶去歡樂。」

值得一提的是，此次是鄭彩妍繼去年出演tvN電視劇《獨酒男女》後出演的第二部電視劇作品。劇中，她將飾演女主人公的少女時期。 此外，演員李沇熹、呂珍九也都接到了出演提案，正在積極討論出演一事。

另外，《再次重逢的世界》講述的是19歲的青年與31歲青梅竹馬的女生之間的奇幻愛情故事，是電視劇《看見味道的少女》、《美女孔心》的編劇李熙明與導演白秀燦再度攜手打造的作品，將接檔《奇怪的搭檔》於7月播出。（責編：歸芸珠）<全星網>

She’s All That: Top 10 K-Pop Idol Girl Crushes
4. Jeon Somi
If you could only use one word to describe Somi, it would be multi-talented. She’s a certified Taekwondo pro, a piano player, singer, dancer, and a model, all in one small package. She exudes a youthful and carefree attitude; everyone just wants to be around her. In Korea, during Somi’s “Produce 101” days, she was the most searched name when it came to makeup. And as the youngest of “Sister’s Slam Dunk Season 2,” she shows her real self: clumsy, funny, and silly, turning into goo when she fangirls Minzy. She’s a bubbly kid. She could be anyone’s dream girl, best friend, or sister.

7. Chaeyeon of DIA
Chaeyeon is obviously pretty. She has that kind, innocent, and angelic face anyone could fall for. She’s practically a goddess! But she’s not just your ordinary pretty idol. She got flak from netizens who bashed her after she failed to attend DIA events due to her schedule for I.O.I (many fans think she was a traitor to the other group), started a controversy when she admitted having plastic surgery on her nose, and she gets a lot of haters online.

But in one interview, she revealed that she still remains strong and professional through it all: “Honestly, I do get hurt by those [comments]. I can’t not see the negative comments. The ones that speak badly about my parents hurt the most… As I work in this industry, I sometimes feel depressed and sad, but there’s more joy. I hope people do not dislike me too much.”

And as the youngest of “Sister’s Slam Dunk Season 2,” she shows her real self: clumsy, funny, and silly, turning into goo when she fangirls Minzy. She’s a bubbly kid. She could be anyone’s dream girl, best friend, or sister.

7. Chaeyeon of DIA
Chaeyeon is obviously pretty. She has that kind, innocent, and angelic face anyone could fall for. She’s practically a goddess! But she’s not just your ordinary pretty idol. She got flak from netizens who bashed her after she failed to attend DIA events due to her schedule for I.O.I (many fans think she was a traitor to the other group), started a controversy when she admitted having plastic surgery on her nose, and she gets a lot of haters online.

But in one interview, she revealed that she still remains strong and professional through it all: “Honestly, I do get hurt by those [comments]. I can’t not see the negative comments. The ones that speak badly about my parents hurt the most… As I work in this industry, I sometimes feel depressed and sad, but there’s more joy. I hope people do not dislike me too much.”
